meta_title: Travel Health & Vaccinations — Coming Soon | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Travel health consultations and vaccinations coming soon to My Private Clinic in Fulwood, Preston. Register your interest with Dr Faizal Secretary.
hero_sub: Pre-travel health consultations and vaccinations are coming to My Private Clinic. Register your interest and we'll let you know the moment we're ready.
intro_quote: Your trip is booked. You need your vaccinations sorted quickly.
intro_heading: Travel Health & Vaccinations in Preston — Coming Soon
intro_para_1: Dr Faizal Secretary is expanding My Private Clinic's services to include travel health consultations and country-specific vaccinations.
intro_para_2: Register your interest below and we'll contact you as soon as the service launches.

faqs.question: When is travel health launching?
faqs.answer: We are targeting Spring 2026 for the launch of our travel health service. Register your interest to be notified.

faqs.question: What will travel health consultations include?
faqs.answer: Pre-travel risk assessment, country-specific vaccination advice and administration, malaria prophylaxis, travel health certificates and general travel health guidance.

faqs.question: How do I register my interest?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034 or email hello@myprivate.clinic to register your interest.
